title: Muffin's Pale Garden
description: Add A new Biome from Minecraft Live 2024 before its even announced!
body:
# Muffin's Pale Garden

> This mod only exist for challenging my skills and Youtube Content for my channel.
> This mod is **no longer being supported**, but some idea may be revision to other project.

# Pale Garden Biome
An End Biome with Pale Forest. Filled with hostile mobs. Creakers.
![Muffin's Pale Garden](https://imgur.com/N9ZiyQG.png)

## Creakers
An Hostile mobs that stalk player from behind, If the player looks in its eyes. It will get furious.

![The Creaker stalk behind the player](https://imgur.com/E5NmAaq.png)
